endpoints.name: balance
endpoints.description: Returns your account's credit balance
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY.

endpoints.name: statistics
endpoints.description: Returns data from the statistics report. Note that by default the statistics shown are based on the number of messages, use the calculateCreditValue should you wish to calculate the statistics based on credit value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY.

endpoints.name: transfer
endpoints.description: Transfers credits between two users in the same team. The account email address fields as well as the number of credits to transfer are required.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY.

endpoints.name: search
endpoints.description: Find a user for a particular email address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY.

endpoints.name: create
endpoints.description: Creates a new sub-account in your team. The following fields are required firstname, lastname, email address, contact number and password.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY.

endpoints.name: getUser
endpoints.description: Gets a user from a given user id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: update
endpoints.description: Updates a sub-account in your team. The following fields can be updated firstname, lastname, contact number and password.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: send
endpoints.description: Sends a single message. The recipientNumber and message fields are required. All other fields are optional.

endpoints.name: send-url-parameters

endpoints.name: send-url-parameters

endpoints.name: send-url
endpoints.description: Send a single message using your unique URL without having to authenticate using your email address or REST API token. The token required is the URL Sending token available on the developer setting page. The recipientNumber and message parameters are required. All other parameters are optional. Not that the token required here is
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZOOMCONNECT_API_KEY}} with your ZOOMCONNECT API KEY. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.
